Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* ******************************************************************************* *)
(** * Bicategories
    Benedikt Ahrens, Marco Maggesi
    February 2018
 ********************************************************************************* *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.CleavingOfBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.FiberCategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.FiberBicategory.FiberBicategory1.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

Section LocalIsoFibration.
  Context {C : bicat}.

  Variable (D : disp_bicat C) (h : local_iso_cleaving D) (c : C).

  Local Arguments transportf {_} {_} {_} {_} {_} _.
  Local Arguments transportb {_} {_} {_} {_} {_} _.
  Local Arguments disp_lassociator {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.
  Local Arguments disp_rassociator {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.
  Local Notation "'ℓ1'" := (local_iso_cleaving_1cell h _ (idempunitor c))
                             (at level 0).
  Local Notation "'ℓ2'" := (disp_local_iso_cleaving_invertible_2cell h _ (idempunitor c))
                             (at level 0).
  Local Notation "f ^-1" := (disp_inv_cell f).

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a₁ a₂ a₃ a₄ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f₁ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧)
(f₂ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧)
(f₃ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧),
rassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ • lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ =
id₂ (f₁ · f₂ · f₃)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a₁ a₂ a₃ a₄ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f₁ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧)
(f₂ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧)
(f₃ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧),
rassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ • lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ =
id₂ (f₁ · f₂ · f₃)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
transportf
  (transportf
     (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ2 ▹▹ f₃)) •• disp_rassociator)
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = disp_id2 ℓ1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
transportf
  (transportf
     (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ2 ▹▹ f₃)) •• disp_rassociator)
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
?b = disp_id2 ℓ1

D: disp_bicat C

transportf

     (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ2 ▹▹ f₃)) •• disp_rassociator)
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
•• transportf

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
transportf
  (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ2 ▹▹ f₃)) •• disp_rassociator)
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
•• transportf
     (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?b

        apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

D: disp_bicat C

     (transportf
        ((((ℓ2 •• (ℓ2 ▹▹ f₃)) •• disp_rassociator)
          •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
         •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
disp_id2 ℓ1

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
transportf (disp_id2 ℓ1) = disp_id2 ℓ1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
isaset (id₁ c ==> id₁ c)

    apply C.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a₁ a₂ a₃ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ a₂) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a₁ a₂ a₃ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ a₂) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
transportf
  (transportf
     (((ℓ2 •• (f ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ g) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        ((ℓ2
          •• (transportf (ℓ2 •• disp_runitor f) ▹▹ g))
         •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
transportf
  ((ℓ2 •• (f ◃◃ transportf (ℓ2 •• disp_lunitor g)))
   •• ℓ2 ^-1)

   •• transportf
        ((ℓ2
          •• (transportf (ℓ2 •• disp_runitor f) ▹▹ g))
         •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?b

g: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
?b = ?t2

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
transportf
  (transportf
     ((ℓ2 •• (f ◃◃ (ℓ2 •• disp_lunitor g))) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
transportf
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ g) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• ((ℓ2 •• ((ℓ2 •• disp_runitor f) ▹▹ g)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))

   •• ((ℓ2 •• ((ℓ2 •• disp_runitor f) ▹▹ g)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))

     ((f ◃◃ (ℓ2 •• disp_lunitor g)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t20

        apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
g: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ c))
    (id₁ c ◃ (linvunitor (id₁ c) • lunitor (id₁ c)))
    (lunitor (id₁ c)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c, h • lunitor (id₁ c))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      linvunitor (id₁ c) • h)
     (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof c))) @
strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof5 c =
(maponpaths
   (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
    linvunitor (id₁ c) • h)
   (maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
       h • lunitor (id₁ c))
      (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (linvunitor (id₁ c))
           (lunitor (id₁ c))) @
    ! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c))
        (id₁ c ◃ lunitor (id₁ c)) (lunitor (id₁ c))) @
 ! vassocl (linvunitor (id₁ c))
     (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c))
     ((id₁ c ◃ lunitor (id₁ c)) • lunitor (id₁ c))) @
(maponpaths
   (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
    (linvunitor (id₁ c) • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
    • h)
   (maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
       h • lunitor (id₁ c))
      (! runitor_rwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
    ! vassocr (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (runitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c) (lunitor (id₁ c))) @
 ! vassocl
     (linvunitor (id₁ c)
      • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     ((runitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c) • lunitor (id₁ c))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • lunitor (id₁ c))
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
        (! id2_left (runitor (id₁ c)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • runitor (id₁ c))
           (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
         ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ c))
             (linvunitor (id₁ c)) (runitor (id₁ c))) @
      ! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (lunitor (id₁ c))
          (linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))) @
   ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
       ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c)) ▹ id₁ c)
       (lunitor (id₁ c))) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      (lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c) • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • lunitor (id₁ c))
        ((! id2_left
              ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
               ▹ id₁ c) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h
             • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
                ▹ id₁ c))
            (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ c))
             (linvunitor (id₁ c))
             ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
              ▹ id₁ c)) @
      ! vassocr (lunitor (id₁ c))
          (linvunitor (id₁ c)
           • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
              ▹ id₁ c)) (lunitor (id₁ c))) @
   ! vassocl (lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
       (lunitor (id₁ c))
       ((linvunitor (id₁ c)
         • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
            ▹ id₁ c)) • lunitor (id₁ c))) @
! vassocl
    ((linvunitor (id₁ c)
      • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
    ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c) • lunitor (id₁ c))
    ((linvunitor (id₁ c)
      • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
         ▹ id₁ c)) • lunitor (id₁ c)) @
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   h
   • ((linvunitor (id₁ c)
       • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • runitor (id₁ c))
          ▹ id₁ c)) • lunitor (id₁ c)))
  (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c) @
maponpaths (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • lunitor (id₁ c))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         linvunitor (id₁ c) • h)
        (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
           (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof0 c)))) @
maponpaths (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
  (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof6 c) @
id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c))

    apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

  Section LassociatorLassociator.
    Variable (a₁ a₂ a₃ a₄ a₅ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
             (f₁ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁ , a₂ ⟧)
             (f₂ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂ , a₃ ⟧)
             (f₃ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃ , a₄ ⟧)
             (f₄ : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄ , a₅ ⟧).
    Arguments transportf {_} _ {_} {_} _ _.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (((idempunitor c
       • (id₁ c
          ◃ (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     • (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
    • ((idempunitor c
        • ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           ▹ id₁ c)) • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
((f₁ ◃ lassociator f₂ f₃ f₄)
 • lassociator f₁ (f₂ · f₃) f₄)
• (lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ ▹ f₄) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (((idempunitor c
       • (id₁ c
          ◃ (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     • (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
    • ((idempunitor c
        • ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           ▹ id₁ c)) • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
((f₁ ◃ lassociator f₂ f₃ f₄)
 • lassociator f₁ (f₂ · f₃) f₄)
• (lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ ▹ f₄) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
((f₁ ◃ lassociator f₂ f₃ f₄)
 • lassociator f₁ (f₂ · f₃) f₄)
• (lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ ▹ f₄) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         h
         • (((linvunitor (id₁ c)
              • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
               • lunitor (id₁ c))))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • lunitor (id₁ c))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
               linvunitor (id₁ c) • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                 (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)))))
     (((ℓ2
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?y'

                apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
              
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      h
      • (((linvunitor (id₁ c)
           • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
          • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         • ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
            • lunitor (id₁ c))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • lunitor (id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            linvunitor (id₁ c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
              (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      h
      • (((linvunitor (id₁ c)
           • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
          • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         • ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
            • lunitor (id₁ c))))
     (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof5 c) @
   maponpaths (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
     (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c))
  (((ℓ2
     •• (f₁
         ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
    •• ℓ2 ^-1)
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
•• ((ℓ2
     •• (transportf
           (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
           (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)
           (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
    •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?b0

              (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,

                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))

            h • lunitor (id₁ c))
           (maponpaths

               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))

      •• (f₁

         (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof5 c) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
         (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
       h
       • ((linvunitor (id₁ c) • (id₂ (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c))
          • lunitor (id₁ c))) (id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c))) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
      (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof6 c)) @
   id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c)))
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1))

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
    • (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
lassociator f₁ f₂ (f₃ · f₄)
• lassociator (f₁ · f₂) f₃ f₄

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
    • (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
lassociator f₁ f₂ (f₃ · f₄)
• lassociator (f₁ · f₂) f₃ f₄

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
lassociator f₁ f₂ (f₃ · f₄)
• lassociator (f₁ · f₂) f₃ f₄

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
lassociator f₁ f₂ (f₃ · f₄)
• lassociator (f₁ · f₂) f₃ f₄ =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c)))
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)
     (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)
        (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c)))
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)
     (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• transportf
        (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)
        (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
?b =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)

  (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c)

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
     (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c))
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         h
         • (((linvunitor (id₁ c)
              • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
               • lunitor (id₁ c))))
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c))
     ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
      •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t2

        apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (id2_left (id₂ (id₁ c)))
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         h
         • (((linvunitor (id₁ c)
              • (id₁ c ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c)))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((lunitor (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
               • lunitor (id₁ c))))
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₂ (id₁ c) • h)
        (strict_fiber_bicat_data_subproof4 c))
     ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
      •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (idempunitor c
     • (id₁ c
        ◃ (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
    • ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
       • ((idempunitor c
           • ((((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step1)
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
     •• ℓ2 ^-1)
    •• (((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))
   •• ((ℓ2
        •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
       •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
       •• ((ℓ2
            •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step1)
  ((((ℓ2
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

       •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))

(ℓ2 ^-1 •• ((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator))
•• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?b

                             apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                           
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?t26

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?b

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (transportb (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?t26

                           apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                         
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
     (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) =
?y'1

                         apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                       
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
       h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
      (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
  (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator = ?t25

                       apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                     
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)) = ?y'0

                     apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                   
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
         (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
      ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
•• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t24

                   apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

  (transportf

      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))

           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),

             maponpaths

            ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c)
                (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
     (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?y'

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h
      • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),

            (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
      ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
   •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
•• ((ℓ2
     •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
    •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t23

                apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
              
C: bicat

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         h
         • ((idempunitor c
             • ((((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                ▹ id₁ c))
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,

            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
            ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
      •• ((ℓ2
           •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
          •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t22

              apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

C: bicat

c: C

  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         (idempunitor c

                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
         • h)

           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,

                         (id₁ c))

                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h

                      (id₁ c))

                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @

                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @

                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

                      (id₁ c))) @

                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (((idempunitor c

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         (idempunitor c
          • (id₁ c
             ◃ (((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
         • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c
                • ((((idempunitor c • (... ◃ ...))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((...) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                  ! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
               ! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (((idempunitor c
                • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
             ((idempunitor c
               • ((((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
      ! vassocl
          (idempunitor c
           • (id₁ c
              ◃ (((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           • ((idempunitor c
               • ((((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((ℓ2
       •• (f₁
           ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
      •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
          •• ((ℓ2
               •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t2

        apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step1)
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     ((maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
          (idempunitor c
           • (id₁ c
              ◃ (((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
          • h)
         (maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
             h
             • ((idempunitor c
                 • ((((... • ...)
                      • lassociator (...) (...) (...))
                     • ((...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                        • (...) ^-1%bicategory))
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h
                • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : ... ==> ..., h • (...))
                      (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                   ! vassocr
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c)
                       (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
                ! vassocr
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    (idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))) @
             ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
          ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              (((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ((idempunitor c
                • ((((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
       ! vassocl
           (idempunitor c
            • (id₁ c
               ◃ (((idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
           (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
            • ((idempunitor c
                • ((((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      ! vassocl
          ((idempunitor c
            • (id₁ c
               ◃ (((idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
          ((idempunitor c
            • ((((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
               ▹ id₁ c))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     ((ℓ2
       •• (f₁
           ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
      •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
          •• ((ℓ2
               •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
       •• ((ℓ2
            •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (idempunitor c
     • (id₁ c
        ◃ (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
    • (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (((((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step3)
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
       •• ((ℓ2
            •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧

p : (idempunitor c
     • (id₁ c

            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)

                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step3)
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
       •• ((ℓ2
            •• ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

C: bicat

c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

  (pr1 step3)

            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

?b =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

                  •• disp_lassociator)

c: C

  (pr1 step3)
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁

            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

(ℓ2
 •• (f₁
     ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
•• ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))

 •• (f₁

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  ((! id2_left
        ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
         ▹ id₁ c) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
       h

            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
          ▹ id₁ c)) (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       (idempunitor c)
       ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) ▹ id₁ c))
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)

?t25

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        ((! id2_left
              ((((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
               ▹ id₁ c) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h
             • ((((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)

            (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c)))
     (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
      •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t24

                  apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

                       (id₁ c))

             (idempunitor c

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step3)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         (idempunitor c
          • (id₁ c
             ◃ (((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
         • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
            ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
               ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ((! id2_left
                       ((((...)
                          • lassociator ... ... ...)
                         • ((...) • ... ^-1%bicategory))
                        ▹ id₁ c) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h • ((... • ...) ▹ id₁ c))
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                  ! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      ((((idempunitor c • (...))
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        • ((... ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                       ▹ id₁ c)) @
               ! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • ((((idempunitor c • (... ◃ ...))
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        • (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                       ▹ id₁ c))
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
            ! vassocl
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ((idempunitor c
                  • ((((idempunitor c
                        • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c)
                         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
         ! vassocl
             ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             ((idempunitor c
               • ((((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((ℓ2
       •• (f₁
           ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
      •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
              •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : (idempunitor c
     • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
        • (id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))))
    • (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (((((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step4)
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

  (pr1 step4)
  ((ℓ2
    •• (f₁
        ◃◃ (((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
            •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)

               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

c: C

               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)

f₁
◃◃ transportb
     ((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• (disp_lassociator
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t20

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
  (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocl
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (f₁
   ◃◃ ((ℓ2 •• (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
       •• (disp_lassociator
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t20

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
  (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocl
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
     (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocl (idempunitor c)
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     (transportf
        (λ α : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ α] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
        (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (idempunitor c)
           ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
            • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
        ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
         •• (f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))) =
?t20

        ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
         •• (f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))) =
?b

              apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
            
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
  (maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocl (idempunitor c)
          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
   maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocl
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ α] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (idempunitor c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
              •• (disp_lassociator
                  •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))) =
?t20

            apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (idempunitor c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocl (idempunitor c)
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocl
             (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
      •• (f₁
          ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
              •• (disp_lassociator
                  •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
?y'

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      idempunitor c • h)
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (idempunitor c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocl (idempunitor c)
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      maponpaths (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocl
             (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (f₁
           ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
               •• (disp_lassociator
                   •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
•• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
        •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
            •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t2

        apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step4)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (((((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            idempunitor c • h)
           (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (idempunitor c)
              ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
              (! vassocl (idempunitor c)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
              (! vassocl
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))))
     ((ℓ2
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
           •• (f₁
               ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                   •• (disp_lassociator
                       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
      •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
              •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((id₁ c
            ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (((((idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step5)
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))
   •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
           •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                  •• disp_lassociator)
                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
            •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

  (pr1 step5)
  ((ℓ2
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))))

                 •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
            •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)

                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))
