C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

  (((f₁
     ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
         •• (disp_lassociator
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
   •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)

             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
          (idempunitor c)))
  ((f₁
    ◃◃ (((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
         •• (disp_lassociator
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) •• ℓ2))
   •• disp_lassociator) = ?t25

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
          (idempunitor c)))
  ((f₁
    ◃◃ (((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
         •• (disp_lassociator
             •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) •• ℓ2))
   •• disp_lassociator) = ?b

  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>

         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

            lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)

                 ▹ id₁ c) @
            maponpaths

               ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)

                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c)) @
         ! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (idempunitor c)) @
      ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
          (idempunitor c)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            id₁ c ◃ x)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                  • h)
                 (! id2_right
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c) • h)
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                  ! vassocl
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)) @
               ! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (idempunitor c)) @
            ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                (idempunitor c))))
     ((f₁
       ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
           •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
      •• disp_lassociator)) = ?t25

                      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            id₁ c ◃ x)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                  • h)
                 (! id2_right
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c) • h)
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                  ! vassocl
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)) @
               ! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (idempunitor c)) @
            ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                (idempunitor c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
             ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
             (idempunitor c)))
     ((f₁
       ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
           •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
      •• disp_lassociator)) = ?y'

                    apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  ((maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
             id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
       h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      (maponpaths
         (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
          id₁ c ◃ x)
         (maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c,
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c,
                lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                • h)
               (! id2_right
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   ((...) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c) • h)
                  (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                ! vassocl
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    (idempunitor c)) @
             ! vassocl
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                 (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 (idempunitor c)) @
          ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              (idempunitor c))) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
             id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
       h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
           ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
            • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
           (idempunitor c))) @
   ! vassocr
       (id₁ c
        ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
       (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  ((f₁
    ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
        •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
   •• disp_lassociator)
•• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
    •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
        •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t24

                  apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (((((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
        ((maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (maponpaths
               (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                id₁ c ◃ x)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c) • h)
                     (! id2_right
                          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c) @
                      maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... ==> ..., (...) • h)
                        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                      ! vassocl
                          ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! vassocl
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       (idempunitor c)) @
                ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c)
                     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                    (idempunitor c))) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c)
                     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
                 (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
     (((f₁
        ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
            •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
       •• disp_lassociator)
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
          •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
              •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t23

                apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,

        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>

        ((maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (maponpaths
               (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                id₁ c ◃ x)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c) • h)
                     (! id2_right
                          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c) @
                      maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... ==> ..., (...) • h)
                        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                      ! vassocl
                          ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! vassocl
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c)
                     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                    (idempunitor c))) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)

                       (id₁ c)

                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))

             (id₁ c

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (((((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
           ((maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                h
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               (maponpaths
                  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... · ... ==> ... · ...,
                         lassociator (...) (...) (...)
                         • h)
                        (! id2_right
                             (...%bicategory ▹ ...) @
                         maponpaths (...) (! ...) @
                         ! vassocl (...)
                             ... ^-1%bicategory (...)) @
                      ! vassocl
                          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                          ((... ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                       (idempunitor c))) @
             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                h
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
                    (idempunitor c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)
                       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
                (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
             ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (((((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))

      •• (((f₁
            ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
           •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
              •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) = ?t21

            apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths

        (maponpaths

                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

                        (maponpaths (λ ..., ...)
                           (! ... @ ...) @
                         ! vassocl
                             (lassociator ... ... ...)
                             (... • ...%bicategory)
                             (idempunitor c)) @
                      ! vassocl
                          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...)
                              • ... ^-1%bicategory))
                          (idempunitor c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h

                       (id₁ c))
                  (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                        • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                              • (...) ^-1%bicategory)))
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c

                       • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)

                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)

                      (id₁ c))) @

                (id₁ c

                         (id₁ c)

                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))

                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)

                           (id₁ c))

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step5)
  (transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (((((...)
                        • lassociator ... ... ...)
                       • ((...) • ... ^-1%bicategory))
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
              ((maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... ==> ..., (...) • h)
                        (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                         ! vassocl (...) (...) (...)) @
                      ! vassocl
                          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                          (lassociator (...) (...)
                             (...)
                           • (... • ...%bicategory))
                          (idempunitor c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                        • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...)
                              • ... ^-1%bicategory)))
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)
                          • ((... ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c)
                             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)
                       • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (((((idempunitor c • (... ◃ ...))
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • (((...) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
         ! vassocl (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (((((idempunitor c
                        • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c)
                         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
      ! vassocl (idempunitor c)
          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))))
          (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (((((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (((f₁
                ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                    •• (disp_lassociator
                        •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
               •• disp_lassociator)
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
                  •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                         •• disp_lassociator)
                        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
            •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((id₁ c
            ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c)
              • ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)))
          • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (((((idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step6)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
            •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)

               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))

    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step6)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁
             ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)
                 •• (disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))))
            •• disp_lassociator)
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)

                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
f₁
◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) =
?b

D: disp_bicat C

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧

?t22

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)))
  (f₁
   ◃◃ (((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) = ?y'0

  (f₁
   ◃◃ (((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) = ?b

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
     (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)))
  (transportf
     (λ α : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ α] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
      •• (f₁ ◃◃ (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)))) = ?y'0

   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; (ℓ1 ;; f₄))

f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)) •• disp_lassociator)) =
?t22

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

(f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
•• transportb
     (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)) =

                  apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
                
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         (id₁ c
          ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
         • h)
        (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
      •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))) =
?t22

                apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
              
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c) @
      maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         (id₁ c
          ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
         • h)
        (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
      ! vassocl
          (id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          (id₁ c
           ◃ ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
      •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))) =
?y'

              apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
            
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  ((maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
             id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
       (id₁ c
        ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) • h)
      (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
    ! vassocl
        (id₁ c
         ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
        (id₁ c
         ◃ ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c) @
      maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         id₁ c ◃ x)
        (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))))
  ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
   •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
•• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
    •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
        •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t21

            apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
(f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (((((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
        ((maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
             (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
             • h)
            (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
          ! vassocl
              (id₁ c
               ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))
              (id₁ c
               ◃ ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c) @
            maponpaths
              (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
               id₁ c ◃ x)
              (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)))))
     (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
       •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
      •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
          •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄)
              •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t20

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (((((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
           ((maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))) • h)
               (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
             ! vassocl
                 (id₁ c
                  ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)))
                 (id₁ c
                  ◃ ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                 (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c))))))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
      •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
          •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
              •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                     •• disp_lassociator)
                    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t2

        apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step6)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (((((idempunitor c • (... ◃ ...))
                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                       • (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
              ((maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c
                         · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))) • h)
                  (! rwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                ! vassocl
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)))
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                    (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                         ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c)))))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
               •• (disp_lassociator
                   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
              •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
                  •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                         •• disp_lassociator)
                        •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((id₁ c
            ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c)
              • ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)))
          • ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step7)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((id₁ c
            ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
           • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c)
              • ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)))
          • ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step7)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) = ?b

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?t27

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?b

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃))
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)))
  (disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) = ?b

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
disp_id2 (f₁ ;; ℓ1) •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) = ?t28

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃))
     (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
   •• disp_lassociator) = ?t26

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)) = ?t26

c: C

     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
   •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) = ?y'

                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
   •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) = ?b

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

?b = ?y'

  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))

     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,

        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))

   •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) = ?b

transportb

     (transportf
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,

                  h

                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @

                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h

                      (id₁ c))

                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

            maponpaths

                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))))
        ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)

                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))))
        ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
?b = ?t25

                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportb
     (transportf
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))))
        ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?b

                      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (! vassocr
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
        • ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))))
     ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t25

                    apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c)
                (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))) @
   ! vassocr
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
        • ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
   ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
       ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  ((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator) •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
   •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄ = ?t24

            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))

                      (id₁ c))
