                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))) @
         ! vassocr
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              • ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     (((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) =
?t23

                
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))) @
         ! vassocr
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              • ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     (((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) =
?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
?b = ?t23

                
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)))) @
         ! vassocr
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              • ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
         ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     (((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
        •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) =
?b

                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
            maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (! vassocr
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   (idempunitor c)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                (idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))) @
      ! vassocr
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           • ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
      ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
          ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1 =
?t24

                  apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.

c: C

transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)

            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)

  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h

                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                     h
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (! id2_left
                         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                     maponpaths
                       (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                              id₁ c · id₁ c,
                        h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                     h
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (! vassocr
                         (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         (idempunitor c)
                         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c
                       • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)))) @
            ! vassocr
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 • ((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
            ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
      •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t23

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                     h
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (! id2_left
                         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                     maponpaths
                       (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                              id₁ c · id₁ c,
                        h • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                     h
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (! vassocr
                         (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         (idempunitor c)
                         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
               maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (! vassocr
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      (idempunitor c
                       • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)))) @
            ! vassocr
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 • ((idempunitor c
                     • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
            ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ((idempunitor c
                  • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (((idempunitor c
                • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
      •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t22

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
 •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ;; f₄ ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     ((maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
         (maponpaths
            (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                      h
                      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     (! id2_left
                          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                      maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... · ... ==> ... · ...,
                         h • (... ◃ ...))
                        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c))) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                      h
                      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     (! vassocr
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c)
                          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  (! vassocr
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c
                        • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)))) @
             ! vassocr
                 ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  • ((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)))
                 ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
             ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ((idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
         (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              (((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
      ! vassocr
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          ((((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
           ▹ id₁ c) (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
         •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
      •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t21

            apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

D: disp_bicat C

c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

(f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)

     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         ((id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
               (id₁ c)
             • ((id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ▹ id₁ c))) • h)

            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
            (maponpaths
               (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
                x ▹ id₁ c)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                               id₁ c · (...),
                         h
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        (! id2_left
                             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                         maponpaths
                           (λ h : ..., h • ...)
                           (! vcomp_linv (...))) @
                      maponpaths
                        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                               id₁ c · (...),
                         h
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        (! vassocr
                             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                             (idempunitor c)
                             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     (! vassocr
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c
                           • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)))) @
                ! vassocr
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     • ((idempunitor c
                         • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)))
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
                ! vassocr
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ((idempunitor c
                      • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
            (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 (((idempunitor c
                    • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
         ! vassocr
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             ((((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
              ▹ id₁ c) (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
       •• (disp_lassociator •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
      •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
             •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
          •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t20

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

D: disp_bicat C

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
            ((id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)

             • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                  (id₁ c)
                • ((id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ▹ id₁ c))) • h)
           ((maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                         h
                         • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c))
                        (maponpaths
                           (λ h : ... ==> ...,
                            h
                            • lassociator ... ... ...)
                           (! id2_left (...) @

                            ▹ id₁ c))
                        (! vassocr
                             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                             (idempunitor c

                             (lassociator (id₁ c)
                                (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))) @
                   ! vassocr
                       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        • ((idempunitor c
                            • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                           • lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
                       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
                   ! vassocr
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ((idempunitor c

                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step7)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
               ((id₁ c
                 ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)))
                • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                     (id₁ c)
                   • ((id₁ c
                       ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c))) • h)
              ((maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
                      x ▹ id₁ c)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                               id₁ c · id₁ c,
                         h
                         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                        (maponpaths
                           (λ h : ... ==> ...,
                            h • (...))
                           (maponpaths (...) (...) @
                            maponpaths (...) (! ...)) @
                         maponpaths
                           (λ h : ... ==> ...,
                            h • (...))
                           (! vassocr
                                (...) ^-1%bicategory
                                (... • ...)
                                (lassociator ... ...
                                   ...))) @
                      ! vassocr
                          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           • ((... • ...)
                              • lassociator (...)
                                  (...) (...)))
                          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory @
                      ! vassocr
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ((idempunitor c
                            • (... ◃ ...))
                           • lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                          (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (((idempunitor c
                          • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
               ! vassocr
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   ((((idempunitor c
                       • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
               •• (disp_lassociator
                   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
              •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
               (id₁ c)
             • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step8)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

D: disp_bicat C

c: C

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)

                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step8)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step8)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((((((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)

     (! id2_left (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)))
     disp_lassociator) = ?t211

                                    apply (@transport_f_f
                                             _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
     ((! id2_left
           (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
          h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
            id₁ c ◃ x) (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
         ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
             (idempunitor c))) disp_lassociator) =
?y'0

                                  apply (@transport_f_f
                                           _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                                
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ z] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃)
  (((! id2_left (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
     maponpaths
       (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
              id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
        h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
    maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
             id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
       h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      (maponpaths
         (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
          id₁ c ◃ x) (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
       ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
           (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           (idempunitor c))) @
   ! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
       (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) = ?t210

                                apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                              
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₃)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (((! id2_left
               (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                    id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
              h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (maponpaths
               (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                id₁ c ◃ x)
               (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
             ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
     (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))) = ?y'

                              apply (@transport_f_f
                                       _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                            
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₃)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (((! id2_left
            (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
        maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                 id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
           h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
          h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         (maponpaths
            (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
             id₁ c ◃ x) (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
          ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              (idempunitor c))) @
      ! vassocr
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
   ! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
       ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
  (disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1 =
?t29

                            apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (((! id2_left
                  (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                       id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                 h
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                     (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                h
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               (maponpaths
                  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                  (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    (idempunitor c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)))
     ((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) =
?t28

                          apply (@transport_f_f
                                   _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (((! id2_left
               (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
           maponpaths
             (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                    id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
              h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
          maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                   id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
             h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            (maponpaths
               (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                id₁ c ◃ x)
               (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
             ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 (idempunitor c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
      ! vassocr
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)) @
   ! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
       (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
  ((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
▹▹ f₄ = ?t27

                        apply disp_rwhisker_transport_left_new.
                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?t26

                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?b

                        apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t26

                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
?b = ?t26

                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (((! id2_left
                     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)) @
                 maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                          id₁ c · (... · ...),
                    h
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                   h
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                     (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                   ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
      ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?b

                        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      x ▹ id₁ c)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (((! id2_left
                  (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
              maponpaths
                (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                       id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                 h
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                     (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                h
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               (maponpaths
                  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c, id₁ c ◃ x)
                  (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    (idempunitor c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)) @
      ! vassocr
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  (((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?t27

                        apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
          (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
          ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            x ▹ id₁ c)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (((! id2_left
                        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (...) ==>
                             id₁ c · (...),
                       h
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                      h
                      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ x : ... · ... ==> ... · ...,
                         id₁ c ◃ x)
                        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                      ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c))) @
                  ! vassocr
                      (id₁ c
                       ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t26

                      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            x ▹ id₁ c)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (((! id2_left
                        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : ... · ... ==> ... · ...,
                       h
                       • lassociator (...) (...) (...))
                      (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c · id₁ c))) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                            id₁ c · (... · ...),
                      h
                      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ x : ... ==> ..., id₁ c ◃ x)
                        (! vcomp_linv (idempunitor c)) @
                      ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c))) @
                  ! vassocr
                      (id₁ c
                       ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
             (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t25

                    apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                  
C: bicat

c: C

     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ z] ℓ1)
     ((maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
         (maponpaths
            (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
             x ▹ id₁ c)
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  (((! id2_left
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)) @
                     maponpaths
                       (λ h : ... ==> ...,
                        h • lassociator ... ... ...)
                       (! lwhisker_id2 (id₁ c)
                            (... · ...))) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (...) ==>
                             id₁ c · (...),
                       h
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      (maponpaths (λ x : ..., ... ◃ x)
                         (! vcomp_linv (...)) @
                       ! lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                           (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           (idempunitor c))) @
                   ! vassocr
                       (id₁ c
                        ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))) @
                ! vassocr
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)) @
             ! vassocr
                 (id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
       maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
         (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c))
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
      ! vassocr
          ((id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           ▹ id₁ c)
          (((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t24

                  apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

C: bicat
