h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c,
         (id₁ c
          ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
         • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c,
            lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
              (id₁ c) • h)
           ((maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                         id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : ... · ... ==> ... · ...,
                         h • (...%bicategory ▹ ...))
                        (((...) @ maponpaths ... ...) @
                         ! vassocr
                             (... ◃ ...%bicategory)
                             (... ◃ ...)
                             (lassociator ... ... ...)) @
                      ! vassocr
                          (id₁ c
                           ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                           • lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)) @
                   ! vassocr
                       (id₁ c
                        ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c))
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
            ! vassocr
                ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
         ! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c))
             ((id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c)
             ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
      •• (disp_lassociator
          •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
                •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = 
?t21

            apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

             maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                      id₁ c · id₁ c,
                h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
            ! vassocr
                ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c))
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
         ! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c))
             ((id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c)
             ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
      ! vassocl
          (id₁ c
           ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           • ((id₁ c ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c))
          ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
      •• (disp_lassociator
          •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
                •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t20

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c,
            (id₁ c
             ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
            • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c,
               lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c) • h)
              ((maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                         · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  (maponpaths
                     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                            id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ h : id₁ c · (...) ==>
                               id₁ c · id₁ c,
                         h
                         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                        (maponpaths
                           (λ h : ..., h • ...)
                           ((...) @
                            ! vassocr ... ... ...) @
                         ! vassocr
                             (id₁ c
                              ◃ ... ^-1%bicategory)
                             ((...)
                              • lassociator ... ...
                                  ...)
                             (... ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c)) @
                      ! vassocr
                          (id₁ c
                           ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          (((... ◃ ...)
                            • lassociator (...) (...)
                                (...))
                           • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                         · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                   h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c
                        ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       ((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                          • lassociator (id₁ c)
                              (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                         • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c))
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
               ! vassocr
                   ((id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   (((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
            ! vassocl
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c))
                ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c))
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
         ! vassocl
             (id₁ c
              ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (id₁ c)
              • ((id₁ c
                  ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               ▹ id₁ c)
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
          •• (disp_lassociator
              •• ((((disp_lassociator
                     •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                   ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?t2

        apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step8)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c,
               (id₁ c
                ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c))) • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                        · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
                  lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c) • h)
                 ((maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                            · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     (maponpaths
                        (λ x : id₁ c · (...) ==> id₁ c,
                         x ▹ id₁ c)
                        (maponpaths
                           (λ h : ...,
                            h • ...%bicategory)
                           (maponpaths ... ... @
                            ! vassocr ... ... ...) @
                         ! vassocr
                             (id₁ c
                              ◃ ... ^-1%bicategory)
                             ((...) • (...))
                             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                   maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                            · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     (! rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c
                           ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          (((... • ...)
                            • (...%bicategory ▹ ...))
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                  ! vassocr
                      ((id₁ c
                        ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      (((((... ◃ ...)
                          • lassociator (...) (...)
                              (...))
                         • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                            ▹ id₁ c))
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                       ▹ id₁ c)
                      (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
               ! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                   ((id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                       • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c))
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
            ! vassocl
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c)))
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c)
                 • ((id₁ c
                     ◃ (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                ((((((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c))
                   • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
              •• (disp_lassociator
                  •• ((((disp_lassociator
                         •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                       ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c · id₁ c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c))
              • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c · id₁ c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c))
              • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                 ▹ id₁ c))
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (disp_lassociator
               •• ((((disp_lassociator
                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)

                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =

                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

  (pr1 step9)

           •• (disp_lassociator

                      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
?b =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)
  (ℓ2

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
ℓ2
•• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
    •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ((f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
        •• (disp_lassociator
            •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
                  •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
?t2

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

transportf
  (λ α : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ α] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃ ;; f₄))
  (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• (f₁ ◃◃ disp_lassociator))
•• (disp_lassociator
    •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
          •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t21

transportf
  (λ α : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ α] f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃ ;; f₄))
  (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• (f₁ ◃◃ disp_lassociator))
•• (disp_lassociator

              apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
            
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h
      • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
         • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
             ▹ id₁ c) • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
  (((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• (f₁ ◃◃ disp_lassociator))
   •• (disp_lassociator
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃))
             •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) = ?t21

                            apply disp_rwhisker_transport_left_new.
                          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; f₃) ;; f₄ ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      x ▹ id₁ c)
     (! vassocl (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  ((disp_lassociator •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   ▹▹ f₄) = ?t26

(disp_lassociator •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) ▹▹ f₄ =
?t26

                          apply disp_rwhisker_vcomp_alt.

     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (((f₁ ◃◃ disp_lassociator) •• disp_lassociator)
   •• ((disp_lassociator ▹▹ f₄)
       •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))) = ?b

•• ((disp_lassociator ▹▹ f₄)
    •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)) = ?t26

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄)) ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
        (! lassociator_lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
     ((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
      •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))) = ?t26

                        apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄)) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄)) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h
         • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
        (! lassociator_lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
      ! vassocr
          ((id₁ c
            ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
               (id₁ c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
          ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
     ((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
      •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))) = ?y'

                      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄)) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  ((maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
             id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
       h
       • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
      (! lassociator_lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
    ! vassocr
        ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
         • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
        ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
   maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      ((id₁ c ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         x ▹ id₁ c)
        (! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
  ((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
   •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1 =
?t25

                    apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
            id₁ c, f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄)) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        ((maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h
             • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                ▹ id₁ c))
            (! lassociator_lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c) (id₁ c)) @
          ! vassocr
              ((id₁ c
                ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c))
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
               ▹ id₁ c)
              ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
               ▹ id₁ c)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            ((id₁ c
              ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c)) • h)
           (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            ((id₁ c
              ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c)) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
               x ▹ id₁ c)
              (! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)
                   (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))
     (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
       •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
      •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t24

                  apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

                 (id₁ c)) • h)

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h
               • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c)
                  • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
              (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• transportf
               (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c,
                f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c
                         · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                         id₁ c,
                   (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • h)
                  ((maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c
                             · (id₁ c
                                · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                             id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       h
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ((maponpaths
                          (λ h : ... · ... ==>
                                 ... · ...,
                           h • (... ▹ ...))
                          (! lassociator_lassociator
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c)) @
                        ! vassocr
                            ((id₁ c
                              ◃ lassociator ... ...
                                  ...)
                             • lassociator (id₁ c)
                                 (... · ...) (id₁ c))
                            (lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
                            (((...)
                              • ... ^-1%bicategory)
                             ▹ id₁ c)) @
                       maponpaths
                         (λ h : ... · ... · id₁ c ==>
                                id₁ c · id₁ c,
                          ((...)
                           • lassociator ... ... ...)
                          • h)
                         (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                            (lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                            ((...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                             • (...) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                       maponpaths
                         (λ h : ... · ... · id₁ c ==>
                                id₁ c · id₁ c,
                          ((...)
                           • lassociator ... ... ...)
                          • h)
                         (maponpaths
                            (λ x : ... ==> ...,
                             x ▹ id₁ c)
                            (! vassocl
                                 (lassociator ... ...
                                    ...)
                                 (...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                                 (...) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                    ! vassocr
                        ((id₁ c
                          ◃ lassociator (id₁ c)
                              (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                         • lassociator (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                        (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                   ! vassocr
                       (id₁ c
                        ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                       (lassociator (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                       ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                ! vassocl
                    (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                     • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
               ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                •• (((disp_lassociator
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                         ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C

c: C

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

  (pr1 step9)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)

                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h
               • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c)

                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((...) ^-1%bicategory

                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                          ((...)

                          • h)

                            (lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                            ((...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                             • (...) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                       maponpaths
                         (λ h : ... · ... · id₁ c ==>

                          ((...)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

?b =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step9)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
               h
               • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c)
                  • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
              (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• transportf
               (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                      id₁ c,
                f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1)
               (maponpaths
                  (λ h : id₁ c
                         · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                         id₁ c,
                   (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   • h)
                  ((maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c
                             · (id₁ c
                                · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                             id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       h
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ((maponpaths
                          (λ h : ... · ... ==>
                                 ... · ...,
                           h • (... ▹ ...))
                          (! lassociator_lassociator
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c)) @
                        ! vassocr
                            ((id₁ c
                              ◃ lassociator ... ...
                                  ...)
                             • lassociator (id₁ c)
                                 (... · ...) (id₁ c))
                            (lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
                            (((...)
                              • ... ^-1%bicategory)
                             ▹ id₁ c)) @
                       maponpaths
                         (λ h : ... · ... · id₁ c ==>
                                id₁ c · id₁ c,
                          ((...)
                           • lassociator ... ... ...)
                          • h)
                         (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                            (lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                            ((...%bicategory ▹ ...)
                             • (...) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                       maponpaths
                         (λ h : ... · ... · id₁ c ==>
                                id₁ c · id₁ c,
                          ((...)
                           • lassociator ... ... ...)
                          • h)
                         (maponpaths
                            (λ x : ... ==> ...,
                             x ▹ id₁ c)
                            (! vassocl
                                 (lassociator ... ...
                                    ...)

                                 (...) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                    ! vassocr
                        ((id₁ c

                              (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                         • lassociator (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                        (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)

                        (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                   ! vassocr

                            (id₁ c))

                          (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                       ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                         ▹ id₁ c)
                        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                ! vassocl
                    (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                     • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                             (id₁ c)
                           • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                              ▹ id₁ c))
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                     •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                         ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =

        apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, idempunitor c • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h
            • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c)
               • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c)
                     • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c))
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
           (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))) @
   pr1 step9)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• transportf
            (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
             f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1)
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c
                      · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                      id₁ c,
                (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)
               ((maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c
                          · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                          id₁ c · id₁ c,
                    h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ((maponpaths
                       (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                              ... · ... · id₁ c
                              · id₁ c,
                        h
                        • ((... • ...%bicategory)
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       (! lassociator_lassociator
                            (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)) @
                     ! vassocr
                         ((id₁ c
                           ◃ lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                          • lassociator (id₁ c)
                              (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
                         (((... ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          ▹ id₁ c)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                             · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       ((id₁ c
                         ◃ lassociator ... ... ...)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c)
                            (... · ...) (id₁ c)) • h)
                      (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                         (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                             · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       ((id₁ c
                         ◃ lassociator ... ... ...)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c)
                            (... · ...) (id₁ c)) • h)
                      (maponpaths
                         (λ x : id₁ c · (...) ==>
                                id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
                         (! vassocl
                              (lassociator (id₁ c)
                                 (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                              ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                               ▹ id₁ c)
                              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                 ! vassocr
                     ((id₁ c
                       ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • lassociator (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                     (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                ! vassocr
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                    ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
             ! vassocl
                 (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 (id₁ c
                  ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c)
                  • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
            ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• (((disp_lassociator
                   •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
                 •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, idempunitor c • h)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h
            • (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 (id₁ c)
               • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c)
                     • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c))
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ▹ id₁ c)
                  • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
           (lwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
              (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
              (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))) @
   pr1 step9)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• transportf
            (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
             f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1)
            (maponpaths
               (λ h : id₁ c
                      · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                      id₁ c,
                (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)
               ((maponpaths
                   (λ h : id₁ c
                          · (id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c)) ==>
                          id₁ c · id₁ c,
                    h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                   ((maponpaths
                       (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...) ==>
                              ... · ... · id₁ c
                              · id₁ c,
                        h
                        • ((... • ...%bicategory)
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       (! lassociator_lassociator
                            (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c)) @
                     ! vassocr
                         ((id₁ c
                           ◃ lassociator (id₁ c)
                               (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                          • lassociator (id₁ c)
                              (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
                         (((... ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
                           • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                          ▹ id₁ c)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                             · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       ((id₁ c
                         ◃ lassociator ... ... ...)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c)
                            (... · ...) (id₁ c)) • h)
                      (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                         (((...) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c)
                          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
                    maponpaths
                      (λ h : id₁ c · (... · ...)
                             · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                       ((id₁ c
                         ◃ lassociator ... ... ...)
                        • lassociator (id₁ c)
                            (... · ...) (id₁ c)) • h)
                      (maponpaths
                         (λ x : id₁ c · (...) ==>
                                id₁ c, x ▹ id₁ c)
                         (! vassocl
                              (lassociator (id₁ c)
                                 (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                              ((...) ^-1%bicategory
                               ▹ id₁ c)
                              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
                 ! vassocr
                     ((id₁ c
                       ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))
                      • lassociator (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                     (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                ! vassocr
                    (id₁ c
                     ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (lassociator (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                    ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
             ! vassocl
                 (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                 (id₁ c
                  ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c)
                  • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                        • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                           ▹ id₁ c))
                       • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
            ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• (((disp_lassociator
                   •• disp_lassociator)
                  •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
                 •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) = ?b
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

?b =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)

                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

                ! vassocr
                    ((id₁ c
                      ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c))
                     • lassociator (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                    (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)
                       • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c))
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c
                    ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                   ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)
                       • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c))
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
            ! vassocl
                (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                (id₁ c
                 ◃ lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                   (id₁ c)
                 • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c)
                       • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c))
                      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
              •• (((disp_lassociator
                    •• disp_lassociator)
                   •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1)
                       ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1))))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                (id₁ c))
           • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step10)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• disp_lassociator)
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

    
C: bicat

c: C

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • ((((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                (id₁ c))
           • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              ▹ id₁ c))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step10)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((f₁ ◃◃ (f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• (((disp_lassociator •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
               •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• disp_lassociator)
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C

  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h
         • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! lwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c)))
     ((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• disp_lassociator))
•• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) = ?t23

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h
      • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
     (! vassocr (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c · id₁ c))
          (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h
         • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (! lwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c)))
     ((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• disp_lassociator)
   •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)) = ?b

                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] f₁ ;; f₂ ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
      h • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (! lwhisker_lwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c)))
  ((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
   •• disp_lassociator)
•• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄) = ?t24

                    apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.

a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

                            id₁ c · id₁ c

                          (id₁ c) (id₁ c))

                       (id₁ c
                        ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c · id₁ c))
                       (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                   ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c)) @
            ! vassocr
                (id₁ c ◃ (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                ((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                    (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                  • lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                 • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c))
                (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                •• disp_lassociator)
               •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
              •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• disp_lassociator)
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step11)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• disp_lassociator)
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

    
C: bicat

c: C

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step11)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• ((((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
             •• disp_lassociator)
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄))
           •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>

         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (! rwhisker_rwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
     (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) = ?t24

                    apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄) ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
     (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
        ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
  (transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (! rwhisker_rwhisker (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
             (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
      ! vassocr
          (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           ▹ id₁ c)
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄) •• disp_lassociator)
      •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) = ?t23

                  apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D

(disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))

     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; f₂ ;; (f₃ ;; f₄) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)

                id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))

              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
       ! vassocr
           (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              (id₁ c))
           (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            ▹ id₁ c)

      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)

        (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
           ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)

          • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)

                 (id₁ c))

               ▹ id₁ c)

         maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,

     ((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄) •• disp_lassociator)
          •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)))) = ?y'

  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)

     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c,
      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
       • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)
     ((maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
          h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))

              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
       ! vassocr
           (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              (id₁ c))
           (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            ▹ id₁ c)
           ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)) @
      maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>

         • h)
        (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
           ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
   ! vassocl
       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
        • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
       (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) ▹ id₁ c))
  ((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
   •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?t21

            apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)

                     id₁ c · id₁ c,

                • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)

                  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c
                         · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>

                     ▹ id₁ c)) @

                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,

                    (id₁ c) • h)

                    ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c)
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step11)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c
                        · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                   • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  • h)
                 ((maponpaths
                     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c
                            · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                      h
                      • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c))
                     (! rwhisker_rwhisker (id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c)
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory) @
                   ! vassocr
                       (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                          (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                         ▹ id₁ c) ▹ id₁ c)
                       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)) @
                  maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c
                           · id₁ c ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
                    (rwhisker_vcomp (id₁ c)
                       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c)
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
               ! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (lassociator (id₁ c · id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                   ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                      ▹ id₁ c)
                     • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
                    ▹ id₁ c)))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
               •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                    •• disp_lassociator)
                   •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c) • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
           • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step12)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator
             •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
∑
p : idempunitor c
    • ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       • (((lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
            • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c) • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
           • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
          • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) =
    id₂ (id₁ c),
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step12)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄)
                 •• disp_lassociator)
                •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) •• ℓ2 ^-1))) =

   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)

f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧

f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧

(disp_lassociator •• (f₁ ;; f₂ ◃◃ ℓ2))
•• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃ ;; f₄) •• disp_lassociator) = ?b
