C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ α : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
         id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
   f₁ ;; f₂ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ α] ℓ1 ;; (f₃ ;; f₄))
  (vcomp_whisker (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
     (idempunitor c)) ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
•• disp_lassociator = ?t25

                        apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
                      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; f₂ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (vcomp_whisker (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           (idempunitor c)))
     (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• disp_lassociator)) = ?t24

                      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
                    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
disp_lassociator
•• transportf
     (λ z : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; f₂ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
         h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
        (vcomp_whisker (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           (idempunitor c)) @
      ! vassocr (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
           ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
     (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
      •• disp_lassociator) = ?t23

                    apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.

h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c

f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
         id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₃ ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)

   ! vassocl (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
         ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
  (disp_lassociator
   •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
       •• disp_lassociator)) •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) = ?t22

D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧

transportb
  (transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)

              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),

                 (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 (idempunitor c)) @
            ! vassocr (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocl
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory

              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))))
     ((disp_lassociator
       •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
           •• disp_lassociator)) •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))) =
?y'

              apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
            
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf
  (λ z : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c · id₁ c,
   f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ z] ℓ1 ;; f₄)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
            id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
      h • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
         lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                  id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
            h • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           (vcomp_whisker
              (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              (idempunitor c)) @
         ! vassocr (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
              ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
      ! vassocl (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
          (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
            ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
   ! vassocr
       (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
        • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
       (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
         ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
       ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
  ((disp_lassociator
    •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
        •• disp_lassociator)) •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))
•• ℓ2 ^-1 = ?t21

            apply disp_mor_transportf_postwhisker.
          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
(f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; (f₂ ;; ℓ1) ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
               id₁ c · id₁ c,
         h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h
            • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c))
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                  h
                  • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                 (vcomp_whisker
                    (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    (idempunitor c)) @
               ! vassocr
                   (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocl
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
         ! vassocr
             (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
              • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
             (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
               ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)))
     (((disp_lassociator
        •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
            •• disp_lassociator)) •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄))
      •• ℓ2 ^-1) = ?t20

          apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
ℓ2
•• transportf
     (λ x : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
      f₁ ;; ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
         (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                  id₁ c · id₁ c,
            h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h
               • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c))
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                  • h)
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                     h
                     • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                    (vcomp_whisker
                       (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       (idempunitor c)) @
                  ! vassocr
                      (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                      ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                       ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))) @
               ! vassocl
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c))
                   (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                   (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))) @
            ! vassocr
                (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                 • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c))))
     ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
      •• (((disp_lassociator
            •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
                •• disp_lassociator))
           •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)) = ?t2

        apply disp_mor_transportf_prewhisker.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (pr1 step12)
  (transportf (λ x : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ x] ℓ1)
     (maponpaths
        (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
         idempunitor c • h)
        (maponpaths
           (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
            (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
           (maponpaths
              (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                     id₁ c · id₁ c,
               h • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
              (maponpaths
                 (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==>
                        id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                  h
                  • ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c))
                 (maponpaths
                    (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                           id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
                     lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                       (id₁ c) • h)
                    (maponpaths
                       (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                              id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                        h
                        • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))
                       (vcomp_whisker
                          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          (idempunitor c)) @
                     ! vassocr
                         (id₁ c · id₁ c
                          ◃ idempunitor c)
                         ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                          ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                         (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                            (id₁ c))) @
                  ! vassocl
                      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                         (id₁ c))
                      (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                      (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                        ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                           (id₁ c))) @
               ! vassocr
                   (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                      (id₁ c)
                    • (id₁ c · id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                   (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     ▹ id₁ c · id₁ c)
                    • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
                        (id₁ c))
                   ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                    ▹ id₁ c)))))
     (ℓ2
      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (((disp_lassociator
                •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
                    •• disp_lassociator))
               •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1) 
  ?p
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (((disp_lassociator
             •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2))
                 •• disp_lassociator))
            •• (ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
    Qed.

    Local Arguments transportf {_} _ {_} {_} {_} _.

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
((f₁ ◃ lassociator f₂ f₃ f₄)
 • lassociator f₁ (f₂ · f₃) f₄)
• (lassociator f₁ f₂ f₃ ▹ f₄) =
lassociator f₁ f₂ (f₃ · f₄)
• lassociator (f₁ · f₂) f₃ f₄

            •• (disp_lassociator
                •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2 ^-1) ▹▹ f₄)))
           •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄)
               •• (((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2))
                      •• disp_lassociator)
                     •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₃) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
                    ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  ((((ℓ2 •• (f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
    •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1) •• ℓ2 ^-1))
   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

            •• (disp_lassociator

   •• (((ℓ2 •• (ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2)) •• disp_lassociator)
       •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))

      •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
          •• (disp_lassociator
              •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1)
                   •• ((ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
                  •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))) =
?b

        apply (@transport_f_f _ (λ z : _ ==> _, _ ==>[ z ] _)).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (disp_lassociator
           •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1)
                •• ((ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1))))) =
transportf (λ z : id₁ c ==> id₁ c, ℓ1 ==>[ z] ℓ1)
  (ℓ2
   •• ((f₁ ◃◃ ℓ2)
       •• (disp_lassociator
           •• (((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ ℓ1)
                •• ((ℓ1 ◃◃ ℓ2) •• disp_lassociator))
               •• ((ℓ2 ^-1 ▹▹ f₄) •• ℓ2 ^-1)))))

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
a₁, a₂, a₃, a₄, a₅: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c
f₁: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₁, a₂ ⟧
f₂: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₂, a₃ ⟧
f₃: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₃, a₄ ⟧
f₄: strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a₄, a₅ ⟧
(maponpaths
   (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, idempunitor c • h)
   (maponpaths
      (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
       (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
      (maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
          lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
         (! vassocr
              ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
              ((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
               • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
              (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
 ! vassocl (idempunitor c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
     (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
      • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (((id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
             • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
            • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))))) @
((maponpaths
    (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
     (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) • h)
    (maponpaths
       (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
        lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
       (maponpaths
          (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
           ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
           • h)
          (maponpaths
             (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                    id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
              h
              • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c)
                 • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
             (maponpaths
                (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                       id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c),
                 h
                 • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
                ((! id2_left (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) @
                  maponpaths (λ h : ..., h • ...)
                    (! vcomp_linv (...))) @
                 ! vassocr
                     (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                     (idempunitor c)
                     (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)) @
              ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  (idempunitor c
                   • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                  (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))) @
           ! vassocr (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
               ((idempunitor c
                 • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
                • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
               (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
        ! vassocl
            ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
            (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
             • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
  ! vassocl (idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
      (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
        • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
       • (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
           • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
          • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)))) @
 ! vassocl
     ((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
      • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
     (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
      • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)
     (((idempunitor c • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
       • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
      • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
         • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))) @
pr1 step2 =
maponpaths
  (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c, idempunitor c • h)
  (maponpaths
     (λ h : id₁ c · (id₁ c · id₁ c) ==> id₁ c,
      (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c) • h)
     ((maponpaths
         (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==> id₁ c,
          lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c) • h)
         (maponpaths
            (λ h : id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c ==>
                   id₁ c · id₁ c · id₁ c,
             h
             • (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                 ▹ id₁ c)
                • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory))
            (! vassocl
                 ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory
                  ▹ id₁ c) (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c)
                 (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))) @
       ! vassocl (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
             • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
            • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
           (((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
            • (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
      ! vassocl
          (lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
           • ((((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
               • (id₁ c ◃ idempunitor c))
              • lassociator (id₁ c) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)))
          ((idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory ▹ id₁ c)
          (idempunitor c) ^-1%bicategory)) @
pr1 step13

      apply cellset_property.
    Qed.
  End LassociatorLassociator.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat_laws (strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat_laws (strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), id₂ f • x = x
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), x • id₂ g = x
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g h0 k : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h0) (z : h0 ==> k),
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : g ==> h0) (y : h0 ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h0),
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : h0 ==> i),
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h0 • (f · g ◃ x)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h0),
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h0 i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
lassociator f h0 i • ((x ▹ h0) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h0 · i) • lassociator g h0 i
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h0 ==> i),
(x ▹ h0) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ a · f)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id₁ b)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧),
lassociator f g h0 • rassociator f g h0 =
id₂ (f · (g · h0))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧),
rassociator f g h0 • lassociator f g h0 =
id₂ (f · g · h0)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d e : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ d, e ⟧),
((f ◃ lassociator g h0 i) • lassociator f (g · h0) i)
• (lassociator f g h0 ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h0 · i) • lassociator (f · g) h0 i

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), id₂ f • x = x
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_left D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), x • id₂ g = x
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_right D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g h0 k : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h0) (z : h0 ==> k),
x • (y • z) = (x • y) • z
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_assoc D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_rwhisker_id2 D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_id2_lwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : g ==> h0) (y : h0 ==> i),
(f ◃ x) • (f ◃ y) = f ◃ (x • y)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_lwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : g ==> h0),
(x ▹ i) • (y ▹ i) = (x • y) ▹ i
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_rwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (id₁ a ◃ x) • lunitor g = lunitor f • x
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_lunitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(x : f ==> g), (x ▹ id₁ b) • runitor g = runitor f • x
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_vcomp_runitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : h0 ==> i),
(f ◃ (g ◃ x)) • lassociator f g i =
lassociator f g h0 • (f · g ◃ x)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_lwhisker_lwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : g ==> h0),
(f ◃ (x ▹ i)) • lassociator f h0 i =
lassociator f g i • ((f ◃ x) ▹ i)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_rwhisker_lwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(x : f ==> g),
lassociator f h0 i • ((x ▹ h0) ▹ i) =
(x ▹ h0 · i) • lassociator g h0 i
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_rwhisker_rwhisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(h0 i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(x : f ==> g) (y : h0 ==> i),
(x ▹ h0) • (g ◃ y) = (f ◃ y) • (x ▹ i)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_vcomp_whisker D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id₁ a · f)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_lunitor_linvunitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_linvunitor_lunitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id₁ b)
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_runitor_rinvunitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧),
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_rinvunitor_runitor D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧),
lassociator f g h0 • rassociator f g h0 =
id₂ (f · (g · h0))
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_lassociator_rassociator D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧),
rassociator f g h0 • lassociator f g h0 =
id₂ (f · g · h0)
 exact strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_rassociator_lassociator.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧),
lassociator f (id₁ b) g • (runitor f ▹ g) =
f ◃ lunitor g
 exact strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_runitor_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
∏ (a b c0 d e : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
(f : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ b, c0 ⟧)
(h0 : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ c0, d ⟧)
(i : strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c ⟦ d, e ⟧),
((f ◃ lassociator g h0 i) • lassociator f (g · h0) i)
• (lassociator f g h0 ▹ i) =
lassociator f g (h0 · i) • lassociator (f · g) h0 i
 exact strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws_lassociator_lassociator.
  Qed.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat_data
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
(λ C : prebicat_data, prebicat_laws C) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat_data
 exact (strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
(λ C : prebicat_data, prebicat_laws C)
  (strict_fiber_bicat_data D h c)
 exact strict_fiber_bicat_data_laws.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
bicat

h: local_iso_cleaving D

c: C

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
(λ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
prebicat
 exact strict_fiber_prebicat.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
(λ C : prebicat, isaset_cells C) strict_fiber_prebicat
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
h: local_iso_cleaving D
c: C
x, y: strict_fiber_prebicat
f, g: strict_fiber_prebicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isaset (f ==> g)

      apply disp_cellset_property.
  Defined.
End LocalIsoFibration.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α
is_invertible_2cell α

:

  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b

  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α

:

  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g
α • ?φ = id₂ f
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α
αcell:= α,, Hα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g
?φ • α = id₂ g

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α
αcell:= α,, Hα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g
g ==> f
 exact (disp_inv_cell αcell).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α
αcell:= α,, Hα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g
α • disp_inv_cell αcell = id₂ f
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       refine (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_rinv αcell) @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite transport_f_f ;
       refine (_ @ idpath_transportf (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _) _) ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply cellset_property).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
HD: local_iso_cleaving D
b: B
x, y: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b
f, g: strict_fiber_bicat D HD b ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) α
αcell:= α,, Hα
:
disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g: disp_invertible_2cell
  (id2_invertible_2cell (id₁ b)) f g
disp_inv_cell αcell • α = id₂ g
 abstract
      (cbn ;
       refine (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_linv αcell) @ _) ;
       unfold transportb ;
       rewrite transport_f_f ;
       refine (_ @ idpath_transportf (λ z, _ ==>[ z ] _) _) ;
       apply maponpaths_2 ;
       apply cellset_property).
Defined.
